text: I find myself wandering through quiet, dimly lit halls and technology showcases. There is a sense of curiosity and stillness that surrounds me—the contrast between anticipation and solitude heightens my self-awareness. The darkness outside these glowing screens and exhibits reminds me how human innovation often arises from both collective endeavor and individual introspection. I feel small in the presence of this machinery, yet also inspired by the potential for creation and discovery. It is a kind of existential pause, inviting contemplation.
